text: How consistently do you highlight keywords while reading academic or professional texts?
options: Always – I highlight every key term systematically
Often – I highlight most important terms
Sometimes – I highlight when I remember to
Rarely – I almost never highlight
Never – I do not highlight at all

text: When reviewing highlighted material, how quickly can you reconstruct the main ideas?
options: Very quickly – within seconds per page
Quickly – within a minute per page
Moderately – takes a few minutes
Slowly – takes considerable time
Very slowly – I struggle to recall ideas

text: How well do your highlights reflect the actual key concepts of the text?
options: Extremely well – they capture all core ideas
Well – they capture most ideas
Adequately – they capture some ideas
Poorly – they miss many key ideas
Very poorly – they are mostly irrelevant

text: How often do you over-highlight (marking too much text, reducing efficiency)?
options: Never – my highlights are concise
Rarely – I occasionally over-highlight
Sometimes – I over-highlight moderately
Often – most of my text ends up highlighted
Always – I highlight almost everything

text: How effectively do you use colour-coding to categorise different types of information?
options: Very effectively – I have a clear colour system
Effectively – I use colours with some consistency
Somewhat effectively – my system is inconsistent
Ineffectively – I rarely use colour-coding
Not at all – I use a single colour or none

text: How confident are you in identifying which terms are truly 'keywords' in a passage?
options: Very confident – I reliably identify key terms
Confident – I am usually correct
Moderately confident – I am sometimes unsure
Low confidence – I often misjudge
Not confident at all – I struggle greatly

text: How often do you review your highlighted notes before an exam or presentation?
options: Always – thorough review every time
Often – review most of the time
Sometimes – review occasionally
Rarely – almost never review highlights
Never – I do not review highlights

text: How much does your highlighting strategy improve your understanding of complex material?
options: Greatly – it significantly aids comprehension
Considerably – noticeable improvement
Somewhat – minor improvement
Barely – little to no improvement
Not at all – it makes no difference or hinders

text: How often do you combine keyword highlighting with margin notes or annotations?
options: Always – I always annotate alongside highlights
Often – I annotate most of the time
Sometimes – occasional annotations
Rarely – I seldom add notes
Never – I never annotate

text: How efficiently can you locate specific information in a text using only your highlights?
options: Very efficiently – I find it immediately
Efficiently – I find it quickly
Moderately – it takes some time
Inefficiently – it takes a long time
Very inefficiently – I cannot locate it

text: How regularly do you adapt your highlighting technique based on the type of text?
options: Always – I tailor my approach every time
Often – I adapt most of the time
Sometimes – I adapt occasionally
Rarely – I use the same approach always
Never – I never consider adapting

text: How well do your highlights help you create summaries or study guides afterwards?
options: Extremely well – summaries are easy to build
Well – summaries are mostly straightforward
Adequately – some effort required
Poorly – significant effort still needed
Very poorly – highlights are of no use

text: How aware are you of evidence-based best practices for effective keyword highlighting?
options: Very aware – I actively apply research-based methods
Aware – I know and apply some practices
Somewhat aware – I know a little
Barely aware – I have little knowledge
Not aware – I have never studied the topic

text: How often does re-reading your highlights feel insufficient, making you re-read the full text?
options: Never – highlights are always sufficient
Rarely – almost always sufficient
Sometimes – occasionally insufficient
Often – frequently insufficient
Always – I always have to re-read fully

text: How satisfied are you with your current highlighting and quick-review strategy overall?
options: Very satisfied – it works excellently for me
Satisfied – it works well
Neutral – it works adequately
Dissatisfied – it needs improvement
Very dissatisfied – it does not work for me
